{"tracks":[{"id":"mp8s7dhk-6x9yhzrew","name":"主轨 1","type":"maintain","color":"var(--secondary)","muted":false,"locked":false,"segments":[{"id":"mq27u8bl-xjset6hn8","start_frame":0,"end_frame":300,"content":{"text":"Segment 1: Anime cinematic style, cozy 1990s Hong Kong bedroom at night, POV first-person perspective from an adorable British Shorthair golden shaded cat with round eyes and fluffy fur. The room is warmly lit by bedside lamps, with rain droplets sliding down the large window overlooking neon-lit city streets. The bedroom features floral bedding, a wooden desk with books and decorations, soft ambient lighting, and nostalgic atmosphere. A young girl with long black braided hair, wearing a simple white nightdress and a Hello Kitty hair clip, lies comfortably on the bed reading a book. 0-4 seconds, the cat walks through the bedroom entrance toward the bed, tail swaying gently, then lightly jumps onto the bed approaching the girl. 0-4 seconds, first-person cat POV camera with smooth forward tracking movement, slight head bobbing during walking, followed by a soft upward motion during the jump onto the mattress. Warm tungsten bedside lighting mixed with cool blue neon reflections from the rainy city outside, cinematic contrast, cozy and intimate atmosphere. 0-4 seconds, no dialogue. Audio & SFX: soft rainfall against the window, distant city ambience, subtle cat footsteps on wooden floor, muffled bedding movement during the jump. Precise POV immersion, cinematic depth of field, no subtitles. | Segment 2: Anime cinematic style, continuing first-person cat POV from atop the bed. 4-7 seconds, the cat moves closer across the bed and curiously tilts its head toward the girl while observing the book she is reading. 4-7 seconds, first-person POV camera slowly pushes toward the girl's face and the book in her hands, ending with a gentle close-up framing emphasizing the interaction between cat and owner. Warm bedside lamp glow illuminates the girl's face, soft shadows across the bedding, rainy neon reflections creating a dreamy nighttime mood. 4-7 seconds, the cat said：”小主人，在看什么书呢？\" Voice: Cat-like man voice, curious, playful, Pace: gentle and inquisitive. Audio & SFX: adorable cat vocal performance with precise lip-sync timing, cinematic anime atmosphere, no subtitles, no background sound.","images":[{"source_type":"url","url":"https://rh-canvas-files.xiaoyaoyou.com/731d2ea0ed679c2cc03f9b1ba0d7570a/output/e3028488-4b33-46a4-b7c5-76f83fd6b122.png","file_name":"e3028488-4b33-46a4-b7c5-76f83fd6b122.png","start_frame":0,"end_frame":100},{"source_type":"url","url":"https://rh-canvas-files.xiaoyaoyou.com/731d2ea0ed679c2cc03f9b1ba0d7570a/output/7ef0b5a4-aebe-4999-bd99-a5e4c4e74253.png","file_name":"7ef0b5a4-aebe-4999-bd99-a5e4c4e74253.png","start_frame":101,"end_frame":200},{"source_type":"url","url":"https://rh-canvas-files.xiaoyaoyou.com/731d2ea0ed679c2cc03f9b1ba0d7570a/uploads/1b7b64832872104bd527953b6d30dbba.png","file_name":"1b7b64832872104bd527953b6d30dbba.png","start_frame":201,"end_frame":300}],"type":"ref"},"color":"var(--secondary)"},{"id":"mq2ehbxq-daeom61fb","start_frame":301,"end_frame":601,"content":{"text":"5s one-shot video, no cuts. Anime cinematic style,  intimate romantic atmosphere. A young girl with long black braided hair, large expressive eyes, wearing a simple white nightdress and a Hello Kitty hair clip,  lies comfortably on bed while holding an open book. The frame focuses entirely on her delicate facial features and gentle expression. the girl slowly lifts her gaze from the book toward the camera with a shy smile, softly saying: \"爱上你，我愿赌服输。\" After finishing the sentence, she pauses briefly, then gives a playful wink and reveals an irresistibly cute, sweet expression with slightly flushed cheeks.  extreme close-up facial shot throughout the entire sequence, camera slowly pushes in toward the girl's eyes and smile with subtle handheld breathing motion, maintaining focus on micro-expressions and emotional performance until the end. Voice: soft, affectionate, slightly shy and sincere, Pace: slow and gentle. After the dialogue, precise lip-sync transitions into a natural wink and adorable smile. nodes.title: Markdown注释
widgets_values:
## If you're not satisfied with a particular segment after looping, you can copy the content from `Preview Any` to `Edit Segment Paths` and modify the index value of `Edit Segment` in `input` (a value greater than -1 performs single-segment editing; the default value of -1 generates a complete loop).

## 当你循环后对某一个片段不满意时可以将 `预览任意` 中的内容复制到 `Edit Segment Paths` 并且修改 `input` 中 `Edit Segment` 的索引数值（超过-1即执行单片段编辑, 原始-1是完整循环生成）

groups.title: Modify the segment after the loop has been generated
